version_description: Added lyrics, chord changes where they occur.

versions.version_description: This is simplified for keyboard and/or piano drawn from the live version of the song as played live on Daryls House.

Brilliant pop song from Daryl here. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Chorus plays as first part of intro. Refrain and bridges play as second part of intro. Outro plays as chorus repeating to a quick fade.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

| [ch]Eb[/ch] | [ch]Dm7[/ch] | [ch]Cm7[/ch] | [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Eb[/ch] | [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] | [ch]Cm7[/ch] | [ch]Bb/F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] |

[Verses]

| [ch]Bb[/ch] | [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] | [ch]Bb[/ch]  | [ch]Gm7[/ch] | [ch]Bb[/ch] | [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] | [ch]Bb[/ch]  | [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] |

[Bridge]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]
Please, wait for me (Wait for me)[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
So, wait for me, please[/tab]
(Wait for me)

[tab]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
